questions.prompt: Does the enterprise depend on a specific vendor for a majority of their endpoints, devices, or applications?
questions.intent: Evaluate: Does the enterprise depend on a specific vendor for a majority of their endpoints, devices, or applications.
questions.evaluation_focus: Dependency on a specific vendor for majority of endpoints, devices, or applications

questions.prompt: If there is a vendor lock in, does the enterprise evaluate the lock in and either justify it or explore options to avoid a full lock in?
questions.intent: Evaluate: If there is a vendor lock in, does the enterprise evaluate the lock in and either justify it or explore options to avoid a full lock in.
questions.evaluation_focus: Evaluation and justification or mitigation of vendor lock-in

questions.prompt: Is the enterprise capable of responding to incidents in a timely proactive manner utilizing advanced techniques like AI?
questions.intent: Evaluate: Is the enterprise capable of responding to incidents in a timely proactive manner utilizing advanced techniques like AI.
questions.evaluation_focus: Timely proactive incident response using advanced techniques like AI

questions.prompt: Can the AI powered responses and remediations be automated?
questions.intent: Evaluate: Can the AI powered responses and remediations be automated.

questions.prompt: Are the AI powered responses and remediations reviewed frequently for accuracy?
questions.intent: Evaluate: Are the AI powered responses and remediations reviewed frequently for accuracy.
questions.evaluation_focus: Frequent review of AI-powered responses and remediations for accuracy
